**Compound:** NXB-7042

## Patient-level summary

| Patient ID | Age (months) | Weight (kg) | Dose (mg/kg) | Calculated Dose (mg) | Frequency | Next Dose | PK Clearance (mL/min) | Notes |

| CU-002 | 18 | 9.1 | 0.12 | 1.09 | q3w | 2026-04-12 | 2.8 | Responding well. Weight gain improving. |
| CU-003 | 51 | 15.7 | 0.18 | 2.83 | q2w | 2026-04-10 | 4.1 | New enrollment. First dose administered 2026-03-27. |

## Quick takeaways

- **CU-001:** Stable on current regimen.
- **CU-002:** Clinical note suggests continued positive response.
- **CU-003:** Early in course; first dose recently administered.
- Current individualized PK clearance values span **2.8–4.1 mL/min** across the three active compassionate-use patients.

## Calculations

- **CU-001:** 12.4 kg × 0.15 mg/kg = **1.86 mg**
- **CU-002:** 9.1 kg × 0.12 mg/kg = **1.09 mg**
- **CU-003:** 15.7 kg × 0.18 mg/kg = **2.83 mg**
